title: hieracium pikujense
side_effects: Hieracium pikujense can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can cause stomach discomfort, diarrhea, and vomiting. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also lead to kidney and liver damage, as well as increased risk of seizures and respiratory failure. Furthermore, improper use of Hieracium pikujense can exacerbate existing health conditions, such as high blood pressure and cardiovascular disease.
